title: GenAI Gateway: Unauthorized / Rejected Inference Access (AML.T0040)
description: Detects unauthorized or rejected access to the GenAI inference gateway. Filters auth/authorization failures (401, 403) and ranks the offending identity, API key, and source IP. Repeated rejections from one identity or a revoked key indicate credential probing or unauthorized model use. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0040 (ML Inference API Access).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC GenAI Gateway Logs' and ('Response Code' = '401' or 'Response Code' = '403') | stats count as RejectedCalls, distinctcount('GenAI Model') as Models by 'GenAI Identity', 'API Key ID', 'Client IP' | sort -RejectedCalls
falsepositives: Expired token retried by a legitimate client
